query_title: The Best Little Whorehouse in Texas

recommendations.title: Two Friends
recommendations.overview: Mona, a prisoner on work release, meets Clément, a shy actor. Desperate to impress Mona, Clément recruits his extroverted friend, Abel, to help. When Mona becomes more interested in Abel, it sets off a conflict between the two friends. Meanwhile, Mon

recommendations.title: An Invisible Sign
recommendations.overview: Mona Gray is a 20-year-old loner who, as a child, turned to math for salvation after her father became ill. As an adult, Mona now teaches the subject and must help her students through their own crises.

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Hell
recommendations.overview: Don Champagne seems to have it all, but when his wife, Mona, learns of his affair with a pretty new salesgirl, she will stop at nothing to maintain their storybook life.

recommendations.title: Los Verduleros
recommendations.overview: The adventures of two friends, one a chicken vendor in a market and the other a policeman. They have love affairs and capture criminals.

recommendations.title: My Summer of Love
recommendations.overview: In the Yorkshire countryside, working-class tomboy Mona meets the exotic, pampered Tamsin. To seal their friendship, Mona introduces Tamsin to her born-again Christian brother and helps her spy on her adulterous father. Bound together by their secret

recommendations.title: Vagabond
recommendations.overview: Mona Bergeron is dead, her frozen body found in a ditch in the French countryside. From this, the film flashes back to the weeks leading up to her death. Through these flashbacks, Mona gradually declines as she travels from place to place, taking odd

recommendations.title: Woody Woodpecker Goes to Camp
recommendations.overview: After getting kicked out of the forest, Woody thinks he's found a forever home at Camp Woo Hoo — until an inspector threatens to shut down the camp.

recommendations.title: Rafiki

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Ghoul School
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Fantasy

recommendations.title: Hair Love
recommendations.overview: When dad has to unexpectedly step in for mom to do his daughter Zuri’s hair before a big event, what seems like a simple task is anything but as these locks have a mind of their own!
recommendations.director: Bruce W. Smith, Matthew A. Cherry, Everett Downing Jr.
